thesis_profile.market_mechanism: in the liquid perp-covered core, the optimal sign of each CoinGlass positioning sub-feature varies independently across 4 regime quadrants (high-dispersion-up, high-dispersion-down, low-dispersion-up, low-dispersion-down); v73 introduces a per-feature per-quadrant sign matrix where retail crowding fades in 3 of 4 quadrants except drawdown-capitulation, liquidation imbalance flips between fade (in dispersed-up) and align (in negative-median regimes), and smart-money positioning takes a 4-quadrant configurable sign — taker_imbalance remains sign-positive across all regimes
thesis_profile.directional_claim: rank liquid perp-covered names by blending v64 dual-regime signal with a CoinGlass composite where each of the 3 positioning sub-features uses an independent 4-quadrant sign multiplier driven by per-timestamp (dispersion, sign of median momentum), allowing simultaneous fade-extremity in trend_up and align-with-positioning in drawdown_rebound, while taker_imbalance is always positive — composite weighted at 12% on the final signal stage
thesis_profile.factor_formula: v64 raw_score and stable_rank_score remain unchanged; final blended_signal = 0.88 * v64_blended + 0.12 * xs_zscore(coinglass_composite_v8). composite_v8 = (1/4) * [z_taker + s_retail*z_retail + s_liq*z_liq + s_top*z_top] where the per-feature sign s_X(t) = HU(t)*c_X^HU + HD(t)*c_X^HD + LU(t)*c_X^LU + LD(t)*c_X^LD with quadrant indicators HU=disp*med_pos, HD=disp*med_neg, LU=(1-disp)*med_pos, LD=(1-disp)*med_neg, and per-feature config: retail (HU=-1, HD=-1, LU=-0.5, LD=+1); liq (HU=-1, HD=+1, LU=-0.5, LD=+1); top (HU=-1, HD=-0.5, LU=-0.5, LD=+1).
